title: Top B.Sc Cardiovascular Technology College in Noida
content: XII with minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB). The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) Anatomy, Physiology Biochemistry Pathology relevant to cardiac diseases Microbiology Electrocardiography Medical Electronics Echocardiography Cardiac Catheterization Program Structure01 Clinical Care in Cardio vascular care Apply core and basic knowledge associated with the profession using a patient/family-centered approach and best evidence to organize and implement the preventive, investigative and management plans and will offer appropriate follow-up services in Cardio vascular care. 02 Communication in Cardio vascular care Develop an effective communication with patients, care-givers, other health professionals, members of community and prepare investigation reports, assessment- treatment plans to give and receive clear instructions appropriately in Cardiac care practice. 03 Membership of a multidisciplinary health team Distinguish and communicate within the team, including transparency about aims, decisions, uncertainty and mistakes to work collaboratively and accomplish shared goals within and across settings to achieve coordinated, high-quality Cardiac care services. 04 Ethics and accountability in Cardio vascular care Apply ethical principles and commit to core concepts of clinical ethics and law to practice as healthcare service providers in Cardio vascular care. 05 Commitment to professional excellence in Cardio vascular care Develop and execute professionalism to reflect in thought and action including technical competence, appearance, image, confidence level, empathy, compassion, understanding, patience, manners, verbal and non-verbal communication, an anti- discriminatory and non-judgmental attitude, and appropriate physical contact to ensure safe, effective and expected delivery of healthcare in Cardio vascular care. 06 Leadership and mentorship in clinical care Adapt leadership role where needed in order to ensure clinical productivity and patient satisfaction and respond in an autonomous and confident manner to planned and uncertain situations in Cardiac care practices. 07 Social Accountability and Responsibility of a Cardiac Technician Assess and recognize that allied and healthcare professionals need to be advocates within the health care system, to judiciously manage resources and acknowledge social accountability in the community, region and the nation for Cardiac care professionals. 08 Scientific attitude and Scholarship in Cardio vascular care Adapt scientific and scholarly principles during interactions with patients and peers, educational endeavors, research activities and in all other aspects of professional lives of Cardiac Technician. 09 Lifelong learning in Cardio vascular care Adapt the ability to engage in independent and lifelong learning committed to continuous improvement in skills and knowledge while harnessing modern tools and technology in Cardiac care practice. 01 Work as cardiovascular technicians under cardiology and cardiothoracic experts in mainstream of cardiac hospitals. 02 Pursue higher studies in various specialization in cardiovascular technology. 03 Engage in experiential entrepreneurship opportunities. XII with minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB). The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer)
